title: More Food Mod
description:
This Mod Adds More Food

Key highlights:
Apple Pie
Chocolate
body:
This Mod Adds More Food.
Key highlights: Apple Pie and Chocolate.

This Is A Fun Mod To Play Around With.

Early On In The Development I Will Try To Add More Foods Every Weekend As To Keep Everyone Entertained.

*Please Note That This Mod Is Only A Test And Should Not Be Taken Seriously In Any Way, It Only Adds A Couple Foods.

If You Want To Make A Suggestion Or Give Feedback, Be Sure To Say In Comments.
(Idk If There Is Comments tho)

I Have Worked Hard Trying To Make This Mod A Fun Experiance For All
I Hope You All Enjoy It.

Item recipies are nowhere near refined and I am open to suggestions

Chocolate coco = beans+sugar

Apple Pie = same as pumpkin pie but with an apple

Porridge = Smelting Oaty Mush

Oaty Mush = 3 Oats+Milk Bucket+Bowl

Oats = 3 Wheat for 6

As of a recent corruption glitch on my old pc I will not  be releasing updates for an undisclosed amount of time, thank you for the support and please keep playing with it.
